title: Terminal raw mode panic safety: install hook before init
description:
GOOD CHOICE: Panic hook is installed BEFORE terminal initialization (main.rs 156-165). This ensures that even if a panic occurs during setup, the terminal can be restored synchronously without async context.

A contributor might be tempted to install the hook after terminal init to keep setup sequential, but that leaves the terminal in raw mode if a panic occurs during EnterAlternateScreen or CrosstermBackend creation.

This ordering is non-obvious but load-bearing for the exception safety guarantee.
close_reason: Already documented in DESIGN.md §14 TUI terminal safety invariants (panic hook before init covered)
